name: control_tv
description: Control and inspect a family member's Google TV through the FamilyTV bridge. Use this to diagnose and fix common TV problems remotely: check reachability, see what app is on screen, take a screenshot to understand the current state, navigate menus, type text, launch apps, and recover a stuck TV. All actions are non-destructive — you cannot purchase content, change accounts or payment settings, delete apps, change parental controls, or factory reset. Prefer taking a screenshot to understand state before acting, speak to the user in plain language (avoid technical terms), and confirm with them before major or ambiguous actions. Escalate to a human when a login/password or purchase prompt appears, the screen is unclear, or navigation repeatedly fails.

action.description: What to do. 'check_status' = is the TV reachable. 'current_app' = what's on screen now. 'list_apps' = installed apps. 'take_screenshot' = capture the current screen (best first step for diagnosis). 'press_button' = one remote button (requires 'key'). 'type_text' = type into a focused field (requires 'text'). 'open_app' = launch a known app (requires 'app_name'). 'reset_home' = go back to the home screen to recover a stuck TV.

text.description: Text to type for action 'type_text' (e.g. a search query).

app_name.description: Friendly app name for action 'open_app' (e.g. netflix, youtube, youtube_tv). Use 'list_apps' to see what's installed.
